item.title: Today I made a decision that will define my life. I will not study political science. I will study fine arts in Italy. I will follow my dreams, no matter how unreachable they may seem.
item.description: I will still follow American politics and in the future, I will probably study law to have a deeper understanding of jurisprudence. I'm 19 so I still got time to do everything and I don't want to try to plan the things I'll do in 30 years because it's impossible to predict exactly where I'll be in 20 or 30 years from now. I'm sure things will just present themselves as time will go on. Life is a constant journey with a lot of weird twists and turns. It's gonna be interesting.
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi

item.title: Sexism in sports
item.description:
There is actually a rule that women have to have their butts exposed in beach volleyball? probably made up by men.
For fucks sake, they are in a sport, not in a porn-contest. Why the mandatory revealing of their bodies?
This outfit makes perfect sense for sports. So why can only the men wear this?
Guess that would bring equality in beach volleyball. FP Edit: Hope this leads to more awareness? My first time by the way. Another edit after reading the comments: It was reported falsely as beach volleyball, as this concerns the beach handball team. The correcting tweet is somewhere there in the comments. (originally posted by @zerkalot on 2021-07-18 05:40:15)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Laundry tips from an Appliance Technician.
item.description: Not much of a TL;DR for this but, take better care of your washer and drier, or don't I'm not your real Dad and you people pay my bills. I know what the detergent, boosters and fabric softeners say. Ignore it, please. 1-2 tablespoons of detergent (generally speaking the first line on the cap) or one pod per full load. With thee amount of concentration in soaps these days you really don't need that much. If you use a booster like Oxy clean I'd split it half detergent half OxyClean for full washes. Same with fabric softener (I don't even use it) minimal amounts first line. That goes with using Downey Ball measuring too, there is a line in that you don't want to exceed. Some home made and "natural' softeners and soaps may cause issues also. Especially Vinegar, I've seen it break down rubber seals and hoses over time. If your washer smells that's always too much soap, run a cleaner like Afresh maybe once a month to reduce build up and nasty odor from soap scum. Also clean your dryer vent out maybe once a year depending on the household and pets. Many servicers and brands also recommend changing out the washer hoses every few years. Now for loading a washer I say about 50-75% full on front load and same in top loads. Don't push down the laundry to make shit fit, it needs to be loosely so it has room to wash and agitate. Also that now "full" load is all you should put in the dryer, don't go packing 2 loads in one dryer. Oh and using excess fabric softener and soaps will also cause more lint build up. Another tip for smells is to leave the door of the washer and maybe even the soap tray open after use to help prevent odor, some companies have a magnet holder that keeps the door slightly open for this reason. Finally, clean the lint screen before or after every load. I tell this to all of my customers even if I'm not there for their washer or drier. Sorry I'm not the best at typing things sometimes but hopefully I got my points across. Thanks for reading.
item.dc:creator: Kazooski

item.dc:creator: mormacil

item.title: I’m a Master!
item.description: Completed my bachelors & master’s in 19 months with two young kids (got pregnant and had a third during this time) while working full time as an RN during a pandemic. My maternity leave is over today and I head back to work tomorrow! Front page edit: for clarification - The school, Western Governors University, is a self-paced, competency-based school. If you know the material, you can essentially “test-out” of a class. Don’t get me wrong; it wasn’t without effort - but focus, determination, and paying out of pocket by term (not credit) were big motivators. My BSN took 10 months, and MSN took nine.

item.title: I hate knowing shit
item.description: Growing up, I knew that most kids in my neighborhood didn’t have dads. I just assumed that was normal. I’d never met mine and I was content, at least outwardly. It was eating me up internally. It lead me to make bad choices, and with the environment I was in, that was easy. About a year ago, I finally asked my mom about him. From her description, he was a class S fuck head POS. Which made me even more depressed, because she also went on to explain he was a lot like me. Same interests, same voice, mannerisms, everything. Yesterday I had a breakdown and my wife, seeing this, went and found him on facebook. Yadda yadda yadda, I call him after work today. We talked for 20 minutes. It was mostly him being annoying and rude, saying sideways things about my mom, getting mad I don’t speak his language, saying if I was mad I had no right to be. He let me know he gets a lot of calls from his kids who basically say “hey I’m your kid, fuck you”. He got upset that I wasn’t exactly over the moon about him existing, my mom says that he likes to manipulate people and he doesn’t like when he can’t. All I know is, he’s way worse than I thought and I’m not okay.
item.dc:creator: SoffDogs

item.title: I'll post this now and it won't matter and I don't care because I don't have any friends to pay attention if I don't post it again.
item.description: I'm a mom. Everybody calls me a 32-year-old milf how can I ever be sad? I'm the only one who is there to care for them. And that's the only thing that's keeping me from doing this, but god damn it I don't know if I can keep doing this anymore. My eyes are blurry, I can't see very well because I can't stop crying and all I want to do is die and yes I've called the suicide hotlines, yes I've called all the numbers, I'm 32 years old and I have called all of them since I was 13 years old. But I don't want to do this anymore. I'm so sick of being in so much pain. I don't want to be in pain anymore. I don't want to be in pain. I know what it's like to lose someone from suicide. I know all the reasons to live, but that's the worst thing. Is that everyone tells you, you have to keep living because of someone else. I don't want to be selfish, I don't want to live only because my kids will never know what it's like to live without me. Anybody that deals with depression knows what I mean. It really sucks when your only reason for life is somebody else's happiness. I miss my brother, and I know I can't die because if I do it will ruin their life, but God damn it I'm sick being of alone and having them be the only reason I breathe everyday. I'm so fucking alone. I know I'm posting this at the wrong time. Everybody wants LnI right now, and I don't care. I live in usersub and I will die here. I don't want to do this anymore.
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet
